summary: A dashboard snapshot suggests measurement drift in the acquisition conversion widget.

evidence.excerpt: Conversion widget excludes manually overridden outcomes while accepted metric notes expect all closed outcomes.

drift.was: Metric convention appears to include all closed outcomes.
drift.now: Dashboard widget excludes manually overridden outcomes.
drift.reason: The source event suggests a measurement convention mismatch.

review.reason: Measurement convention changes are high-risk and require analytics owner review.
